name: paper_suite
description: Paper-grade routing workflow covering accuracy, load, scaling, failure checks, and final plot emission. Cache is disabled by default.

workflow_semantics.cache_mode_note: Paper-grade workflow isolates routing behavior from cache hits.
workflow_semantics.scaling_seed_policy_note: Seed cloning is forbidden in paper-grade scaling runs.

lineage_requirements: run_manifest.json with git commit and input hashes
scaling run manifests must record native per-seed provenance
paper-grade runs must keep cache disabled
